summary: Frontend-only validation of the deploy-panel iteration adding real-time WS deploy logs and change-password + new superadmin credentials. All requested UI flows verified: superadmin login, Settings identity + change-password validations (mismatch / <6 chars / wrong current), project wizard creation for octocat/Hello-World@master, live WebSocket deploy-log streaming (lines appeared within ~1s, ended with expected 'error' status due to Docker missing in sandbox), and project deletion.

issues: Sonner success toast (top-right) can overlap the Delete/AlertDialog trigger button, intercepting pointer events until the toast auto-dismisses (~4-5s). Not blocking users, but hindered automated e2e delete right after 'deploy started' toast. Consider positioning toasts away from the action bar or reducing default duration.

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetail.jsx: WebSocket effect depends on loadProject which itself depends on id; because loadProject identity is memoized per id it's fine, but the polling interval (setInterval every 4s calling loadProject) is redundant now that WS pushes status updates on 'end' — consider removing polling to reduce load.
ProjectDetail.jsx line 31: `const [logs] = useState([])` is dead state (eslint-disable). Remove to keep code clean.
Settings.jsx: change-password button remains enabled while `confirm` is empty (only disables on !cur || !nw). Add !confirm to disabled clause for consistency with validation.
Login.jsx: no client-side lockout messaging — HTTP 429 body will surface via apiError, but consider a dedicated banner when brute-force lockout is returned so users understand the 15-minute wait.
test_credentials: superadmin / sa@4dm1n (unchanged, all successful password-change attempts intentionally failed validation; no revert needed).
seed_data_creation: Created project 'TESTHelloWorld' (id 6a5d523dba11b4d33a7df77b) using octocat/Hello-World@master, then deleted via API after UI delete was blocked by a toast overlay. Environment is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested flows pass. Login redirects to '/'. Settings shows correct superadmin/sa@bprbangunarta.co.id. Change-password client validation strings match exactly ('do not match', 'at least 6 characters', server returns 'Current password is incorrect'). WS log streaming works: ws-status-dot gets class 'animate-pulse-line bg-status-running' when connected; lines appear ~1s after deploy click; final status transitions to 'error' with message 'Docker not available (artifacts ready)' — expected in sandbox. Brute-force UI check was skipped to avoid locking out superadmin, backend already curl-verified per main agent note.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The only friction was e2e cleanup: sonner toast overlay intercepted click on delete-action-btn immediately after deploy toast. Worked around by deleting the test project through the API.
